items.text: numberServicesTrue counts how many of inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS are true.
items.fragment: numberServicesTrue counts how many of inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS are true.
items.requirement_fragment: numberServicesTrue counts how many of inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS are true.

items.text: dynamicDecide selects ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision; otherwise it selects GCAS.
items.fragment: dynamicDecide selects ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision; otherwise it selects GCAS.
items.requirement_fragment: dynamicDecide selects ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision; otherwise it selects GCAS.

items.text: outDec is set to dynamicDecide when numberServicesTrue >= 2; otherwise it uses a static priority-based value.
